customer_id.business_reasoning: Primary keys uniquely identify entities. Imputing a primary identifier creates invalid records and corrupts joins.

email.business_reasoning: Email is critical for customer contact and marketing campaigns. Rows without email cannot be used for outreach. Data is incomplete.
email.risk_assessment: Low - only affects small percentage of data

amount.business_reasoning: Median purchase amount is representative of typical transaction. Mean would be skewed by high-value outliers. Maintains distribution integrity.
amount.risk_assessment: Low - median is stable metric resistant to outliers

quantity.business_reasoning: Imputes standard median volume size to complete the dataset without skewing aggregate distribution.

category.business_reasoning: Fills categorical nulls with the most frequent category to represent the standard class.

region.business_reasoning: Fills categorical nulls with the most frequent region location.

last_updated.business_reasoning: For time-series analysis, forward fill preserves temporal continuity. Status typically does not change frequently.
last_updated.risk_assessment: Medium - assumes no change between observations
